name: Capital Bridge Solutions
description: Capital Bridge Solutions is the premier nationwide real estate investment loan broker, shopping 50+ lenders to find real estate investors the best rates and lowest points. Specializing in DSCR loans, fix & flip, portfolio, and hard money loans.

differentiators.shoppingPower: Shops 50+ lenders to secure the best rates
differentiators.closingTimeline: As fast as 5-7 days for fix & flip, 10 days average for DSCR
differentiators.ltvMax: Up to 85% on purchases, 80% on refinances
differentiators.noW2: No personal income tax returns or W-2 verification required
